3. NARCISSUS to MARCUS AURELIUS: So I understand.
4. MARCUS AURELIUS to NARCISSUS: Everyone talking about it?  I wouldn't wonder.  All I seek is a genuine balance of power between the Emperor and the Senate. If the Emperor and the Senate can share power then the people will be ready to take their share.  This means Commodus has to bend; does he strike you as that type?
5. NARCISSUS to MARCUS AURELIUS: You're too hard on him.  He is a strong young man, with you as his guide...

Please, I separated you from the others because...  ... my nose tells me you've been condemned for important reasons. || You are to be killed, exactly.
